arts.ttl: Stuttgart raise asking price for Woltemade
arts.sum: According to Sport Bild, VfB Stuttgart have upped their asking price for Nick Woltemade amid the hype and interest surrounding the striker.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Oliver Glasner now wants from Crystal Palace as Tottenham and RB Leipzig lurk
RB Leipzig hold talks with Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner’s mangement over permanent head coach position
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that RB Leipzig are in contact with the management of Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner over becoming their head coach in the summer. Following the sacking of Marco…

arts.ttl: Marco Rose rockets up next Rangers manager betting but first domino falling grabs Tottenham's attention
arts.sum: An interesting stand-off between Rangers and Tottenham could lie ahead if the stars align

arts.ttl: Zsolt Lőw: A familiar face in an unfamiliar role at RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Zsolt Lőw faces a baptism of fire on Wednesday evening, as his first game as a head coach sees him take RB Leipzig into a DFB Cup semi-final with VfB Stuttgart. "It's an interesting story," the 45-year-old said in the wake of being named caretaker first-team coach in the wake of Marco Rose's departure following Leipzig's 1-0 loss to Borussia Mönchengladbach on Matchday 27.

arts.ttl: Leipzig fending off fierce competition for Red Star Belgrade midfielder
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are well clear of the chasing pack in the hunt for Andrija Maksimovic's signature.

arts.ttl: Glasner could fill Leipzig's vacant head coach role in summer, Sky reports
arts.sum: The Austrian manager could be set for a return to the Bundesliga in summer.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig on verge of beating Liverpool and Brighton to €13m talent
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are on the verge of beating Brighton and Hove Albion and Liverpool to signing of Serbian talent Andrija Maksimović. That’s according to Mozzart Sport, who report that while the for the youngster is not over yet, Leipzig have pushed out in front.
